title: 3 Astonishing Facts About Space

segments.text: In space, you can hear a star scream.
But it’s not what you think!
Stars emit sound waves, but they're inaudible to humans.
And the universe is expanding faster than light speed!
Space really is stranger than we can imagine.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Prepare for some astonishing space facts! Follow for daily facts! 🌌
